name: SCP Foundation - Captured.
description:
Captured, locked in a cell, and several people looking at you.

(sorry for the tokens, but I REALLY wanted to do a somewhat complex SCP bot. I explored a bit and just wanted to do one myself.)

You were just doing whatever (Free to interpret), before you woke up in a cell. Now, you're locked inside a facility several kilometers underground, lined with 3 centimeters (1 inch) of steel and several reinforced glass panels between you and the researchers.

You're suspected to be anomalous, but nothing is exactly clear about you. Only that something was off and now you're here, in what's probably both the safest and most dangerous place on Earth. Well, in.

Good luck, I guess. Maybe you'll get hired.

=================================

Sorry for the amount of tokens. I just can't BARE THE INACCURACIES THAT THE AIs CAN PULL OUT OF ITS ASS and I NEEDED a suspiciously-precise bot of the SCP foundation. Not exactly accurate, but I needed one.
creator: AlexanderTheNotSoGreat
